name: retrofit-miniprogram
description: Retrofit car modification community WeChat Mini Program.

scripts.emit:js: tsc --project tsconfig.emit.json && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path .\.tsbuild -Recurse -Filter *.js | ForEach-Object { $relative = $_.FullName.Substring((Resolve-Path .\.tsbuild).Path.Length + 1); $target = Join-Path (Get-Location) $relative; $targetDir = Split-Path -Parent $target; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $targetDir | Out-Null; Copy-Item -LiteralPath $_.FullName -Destination $target -Force }"
